description: CSLT-08 为前端 L1b 纯消费者模块，不定义新的后端 API JSON Schema 契约。所有对外类型引用自 CSLT-01/04/05/06 和 AUTH-06 的已发布契约。自产 7 个前端 TypeScript 内部类型仅被 L1a 层 CSLT-07 消费，不涉及跨服务 API 调用。

frontend_only.name: ConsultSessionState
frontend_only.description: 8 种咨询会话业务状态：idle / selecting_behavior / submitting / streaming / completed / ticket_guide / submit_failed / stream_failed

frontend_only.name: ConsultErrorCode
frontend_only.description: 7 种前端异常错误码：INPUT_VALIDATION_FAILED / SUBMIT_NETWORK_ERROR / SUBMIT_SERVER_ERROR / SSE_CONNECTION_BROKEN / SSE_NO_DATA_TIMEOUT / CONCURRENT_SUBMIT_BLOCKED / TICKET_CREATION_FAILED

frontend_only.name: PlanSection
frontend_only.description: 四段式方案段落数据结构：{ title: string, contents: string[], isCompleted: boolean }

frontend_only.name: TicketGuide
frontend_only.description: 工单引导标记：{ show: boolean, riskLevel: 'normal' | 'high_risk' }

frontend_only.name: ConsultSubmitRequest
frontend_only.description: 咨询提交请求的前端表示：{ behavior_type_selection: BehaviorTypeCategory[], behavior_description: string }

frontend_only.name: StateTransitionError
frontend_only.description: 状态转换异常类：{ fromState: ConsultSessionState, toState: ConsultSessionState }，在 transitionTo() 检测到非法转换时抛出

frontend_only.name: LEGAL_TRANSITIONS
frontend_only.description: 状态转换查找表：Record<ConsultSessionState, ConsultSessionState[]>，定义 12 条法定转换路径
